allow: Bash(powershell -Command "Get-WmiObject Win32_SerialPort | Select-Object DeviceID, Caption, Description | Format-Table -AutoSize")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-CimInstance -ClassName Win32_PnPEntity | Where-Object { \\$_.Name -match 'COM\\d' } | Select-Object Name | Format-Table -AutoSize")

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-CimInstance -ClassName Win32_PnPEntity | Where-Object { \\$_.Name -match 'COM\\d' -or \\$_.Name -match 'VxComm' -or \\$_.Name -match 'MOXA' -or \\$_.Name -match 'ICP' } | Select-Object Name | Format-Table -AutoSize")

Bash(node -e "const net=require\(''net''\);const s=new net.Socket\(\);let c=0;s.connect\(10008,''192.168.2.21'',\(\)=>{console.log\(''READY! Press keys in this order:''\);console.log\(''1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9, 0, C, ENTER, OK, F1, F2, F3, F4, F5, UP, DOWN''\);console.log\(''''\);s.on\(''data'',b=>{for\(let i=0;i<b.length;i++\){c++;console.log\(''Key #''+c+'': 0x''+b[i].toString\(16\).padStart\(2,''0''\)\);}}\);}\);s.on\(''error'',e=>console.log\(''Err:'',e.message\)\);setTimeout\(\(\)=>{console.log\(''Done. Total:'',c\);process.exit\(0\);},120000\);")

Bash(node -e "const net=require\(''net''\);const s=new net.Socket\(\);s.connect\(10008,''192.168.2.21'',\(\)=>{console.log\(''READY! Press just keys: 1 then 2 then 3 \(slowly!\)''\);s.on\(''data'',b=>{console.log\(''RAW [''+b.length+'' bytes]:'', b.toString\(''hex''\), Array.from\(b\).map\(x=>''0x''+x.toString\(16\).padStart\(2,''0''\)\).join\('' ''\)\);}\);}\);s.on\(''error'',e=>console.log\(''Err:'',e.message\)\);setTimeout\(\(\)=>process.exit\(0\),30000\);")

Bash(node -e "const net=require\(''net''\);const s=new net.Socket\(\);s.connect\(10008,''192.168.2.21'',\(\)=>{console.log\(''READY! Press just: 1 then 2 then 3 \(slowly!\)''\);s.on\(''data'',b=>{console.log\(''RAW [''+b.length+'' bytes]:'',Array.from\(b\).map\(x=>''0x''+x.toString\(16\).padStart\(2,''0''\)\).join\('' ''\)\);}\);}\);s.on\(''error'',e=>console.log\(''Err:'',e.message\)\);setTimeout\(\(\)=>process.exit\(0\),30000\);")

Bash(node -e "const net=require\(''net''\);const s=new net.Socket\(\);let c=0;const keys=[''1'',''2'',''3'',''4'',''5'',''6'',''7'',''8'',''9'',''0'',''C'',''ENTER'',''OK'',''F1'',''F2'',''F3'',''F4'',''F5'',''UP'',''DOWN''];s.connect\(10008,''192.168.2.21'',\(\)=>{console.log\(''Press keys VERY SLOWLY \(3 sec between each\):''\);console.log\(keys.join\('', ''\)\);console.log\(''''\);s.on\(''data'',b=>{for\(let i=0;i<b.length;i++\){const label=c<keys.length?keys[c]:''???'';console.log\(label+'' = 0x''+b[i].toString\(16\).padStart\(2,''0''\)\);c++;}}\);}\);s.on\(''error'',e=>console.log\(''Err:'',e.message\)\);setTimeout\(\(\)=>{console.log\(''Total:'',c\);process.exit\(0\);},120000\);")

Bash(node -e "const net=require\(''net''\);const s=new net.Socket\(\);s.connect\(10008,''192.168.2.21'',\(\)=>{console.log\(''Press ONLY: 1 ... 2 ... 3 \(3 seconds between each\)''\);s.on\(''data'',b=>{for\(let i=0;i<b.length;i++\){console.log\(''0x''+b[i].toString\(16\).padStart\(2,''0''\)+'' \(''+b[i]+''\)''\);}}\);}\);setTimeout\(\(\)=>process.exit\(0\),20000\);")
